_notes: City Kit Suburban: authored clean (XZ-centered, Y=0 base). Scale 8 matches the roads kit so houses sit right on 8 m streets (type-a house -> 10.4 x 6.7 m). driveway-long is a uniform 2.88 x 3.2 m drivable slab -> promoted to a GridMap palette tile (the farm's gravel lane; tiles abut with cell_size [2.88,2,3.2]). The smaller/mixed-width paths stay weld prefabs for one-off decoration.
